infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: FLOW uses your location to show your position on the ski map and share it with your group even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: FLOW needs Always location access to track your position while skiing with the app in the background.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: FLOW needs location to show your position on the ski map.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: FLOW uses background location to share your position with your ski group while the app is in the background.
